title: A Story of David: The Hunted
actors: Jeff Chandler, Basil Sydney, Peter Arne
plot: King Saul of Israel is jealous of the fame and adoration of David, who long ago slew Goliath and brought victory to Saul's armies. Now Saul, egged on by his Edomite counselor Doeg, attempts to have David killed. Saul's son, and Da...
